creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 12:10:49 2012
New Revision: 304500
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304500

Log:
  Add trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon 2.4.1, tryton Application Platform
  (Account Stock Anglo Saxon Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171454
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/
  head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 12:08:56 2012	(r304499)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 12:10:49 2012	(r304500)
@@ -108,6 +108,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_account_be
     SUBDIR += trytond_account_invoice
     SUBDIR += trytond_account_product
+    SUBDIR += trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_percentage

Added: head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 12:10:49 2012	(r304500)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Created by:	Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Account Stock Anglo Saxon Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_account_invoice>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_account_invoice \
+		trytond_account_stock_continental>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_account_stock_continental
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 12:10:49 2012	(r304500)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 54fa51fca993223ad3847bd416632a5bda001ab20dcfc09a6866face156f4467
+SIZE (trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 21784

Added: head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 12:10:49 2012	(r304500)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+This port adds the Account Stock Anglo Saxon Module to the Tryton Application
+Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_account_stock_anglo_saxon/pkg-plist
